scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check renderer/app.js && node --check src/runtimes.js && node --check src/scout.js && node --check src/sentinel.js && node --check src/tts.js && node --check src/workspaces.js && node --check src/workspace-ipc.js && node --check scripts/check-runtimes.js && node --check scripts/smoke-scout.js && node --check scripts/smoke-sentinel.js && node --check scripts/smoke-tts.js && node --check scripts/smoke-pty.js && node --check scripts/smoke-workspaces.js && node --check scripts/smoke-workspace-ipc.js && node --check scripts/smoke-phase3.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('brain.json', 'utf8')); console.log('check ok')"
scripts.smoke:phase2: npm.cmd run check:runtimes && npm.cmd run smoke:scout && npm.cmd run smoke:sentinel && npm.cmd run smoke:tts && npm.cmd run smoke:pty && npm.cmd run check
